title: Viners Barware 4 Litre Champagne Bucket, Silver
features: CLASSIC BARWARE | Our ice bucket for champagne or chilled wine is indispensable for any entertainer at home. Keep your bottle cold at the table by filling with ice, to make any occasion a little more special.
KEEP BOTTLES COLD | This Viners Champagne Bucket has a 4-litre capacity and is suitable for all bottle shapes. The single wall bucket has two ring handles

BRUSHED SILVER | Made from fine-quality stainless steel, our ice bucket is strong with a brushed finish that won't scuff easily or tarnish. Hand wash only without using abrasive sponges. Wash before first use

BARWARE RANGE | Entertain, create and serve with flair and quality thanks to the Viners Barware Collection. Our range has all the tools to professionally entertain guests at home, from cocktail shakers to stirrers and bottle openers

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust barware made from the finest materials
description: From the manufacturer Double Walled Ice Bucket 1.5L Double Walled Ice Bucket 1.5L Double Wall Wine Cooler Champagne Bucket Round Silicone Ice Mould Giftbox Ice Tongs Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 48 3.7 out of 5 stars 15 4.6 out of 5 stars 115 4.5 out of 5 stars 34 5.0 out of 5 stars 4 4.0 out of 5 stars 29 Price £17.95 £ 17 . 95 £15.54 £ 15 . 54 £14.48 £ 14 . 48 — no data £11.18 £ 11 . 18 £2.25 £ 2 . 25 Description The double-wall ice bucket is designed with a practical fold away carry-handle and an insulating layer keeping ice colder for longer. Pack it with ice and keep the lid on until you're ready to serve chilled drinks. The double-wall ice bucket is designed with a practical fold away carry-handle and an insulating layer keeping ice colder for longer. Pack it with ice and keep the lid on until you're ready to serve chilled drinks. Keep wine chilled for longer with this double wall insulated stainless steel cooler. Finished with a satin brush effect on the exterior and polished mirror on the interior. Store and serve your favourite champagne or sparkling wine from this large capacity ice bucket. Highly effective in keeping wines cold and suitable for all bottle shapes. This silicone ice mould will create 4 (4.5cm/ 13/4”) perfectly sphere shapes. Large pieces of ice melt slower, allowing your drinks to stay cooler without diluting. Ideal for Whiskey, Bourbon and Scotch. Deluxe brushed stainless steel ice serving tongs, with ridged edges for a secure grip on ice cubes or fruit.
